NAVAREA XIX 49/26

BARENTS AND NORWEGIAN SEAS

1. AREAS TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION

DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENTS FALL

13 TO 29 APR DAILY FROM 2100 TO 1600 UTC.

 IN AREA BOUNDED BY:



AREA 1

A. 73-01.32N 030-54.14E

B. 71-53.10N 032-54.52E

C. 71-39.33N 031-25.13E

D. 72-47.11N 029-27.53E



AREA 2

A. 76-22.00N 021-55.00E

B. 75-24.00N 024-43.00E

C. 74-51.00N 021-45.00E

D. 75-50.00N 018-50.00E



2. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 301600UTC APR 26
